## Meeting Purpose

[Scope an initial project for Neesha's engagement with AI-led Growth's community initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two main focus areas identified: content strategy and community journey optimization](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [Neesha to propose 2-3 priority projects for the next two months, based on \~25 hours/week availability](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Community initiatives tie into broader company strategy, including a new self-service offering for prospects](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [In-person events seen as potential anchor points for community building](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

## Topics

### Current State of Community Content

  - [Content creation is largely ad hoc, lacking cohesive structure](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Podcasts often result from opportunistic conversations](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Workshops planned last-minute, without strategic topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Video production team assists with community tasks during lulls](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Community Experience Optimization

  - [Website journey is confusing and incomplete](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Unclear differentiation between free and paid content](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [No structured onboarding or engagement strategy for new members](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Need to design rituals and "laddering" to increase member retention](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Flagship Course Development

  - [Plan to create a comprehensive course on core topics](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Aims to train internal team and provide value to community members](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Will cover working methods and content creation with AI](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Potential to be part of a new self-service offering for prospects](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Council/Founding Member Initiative

  - [Creating an association to validate and amplify the community](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Planning to highlight industry experts and leverage their reach](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Need to formalize membership requirements and engagement strategy](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Events team is relatively mature and separate](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Community team is a "jumble" of part-time contributors](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Neesha would effectively be running the community initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Fractional marketing person (Claudia) available but engagement ending soon](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

### Integration with Business Strategy

  - [Community serves as primary marketing channel](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [New self-service offering planned (6-12K) for prospects below agency threshold](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Community membership and flagship course to be part of this offering](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Event Strategy

  - [Mix of virtual and in-person events (dinners, happy hours)](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Planning mini-conferences for industry leaders](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Opportunity to align events strategy with community building](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Neesha to send over typical engagement structure and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Jason to share document outlining how community fits into overall strategy](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Neesha to develop initial options for projects and recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Explore collaboration with Gloria (events lead) on integrated events strategy](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [Neesha to virtually attend tomorrow's workshop at 9am](https://fathom.video/share/As5rFzTJzCCGS7fer3oDuAmsjp2f1Wb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
